meaning: n.骨骼,骨骼相似物(很瘦的人,船的骨架,小说的梗概等)
examples: Human Skelecton model is composed of joints and bones.
Exercise can activate AMPK, which regulate the glucose metabolism and fatty oxidation of skelecton cells.
Uses shape distribution to measure similarity of 3d skelecton which is reconstructed from ct data in this paper.
